final:
module binary_counter (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [3:0] out
);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            out <= 4'b0;
        end else begin
            out <= out + 1;
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out <= out - 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
